name: Meklord Emperor Granel
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>帝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>グランエル<ruby lang="jp"><rb>∞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>インフィニティ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by its own effect. When a face-up monster you control is destroyed by a card effect and sent to the GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn: You can target 1 Synchro Monster your opponent controls; equip that target to this card. Gains ATK/DEF equal to half your LP and ATK equal to the combined ATK of the monsters equipped to it by this effect. You can target 1 of these equipped monsters; Special Summon that target to your field in Defense Position.
